text: I find myself in an environment dedicated to research and innovation, likely a science or technology exhibition. The glass walls and minimalist furniture evoke modernity and transparency, while the colorful wall display and interactive screens stimulate curiosity. Here, I feel a sense of anticipation—a quiet awe at human ingenuity, but also an awareness of the sterility and distance that accompanies institutional spaces. I am simultaneously inspired and a little detached, invited to wonder but reminded of the boundaries between observer and exhibit.
